nodes.name: 农药污染
nodes.summary: 农业化学品通过水体和食物链影响鸟类生存。

nodes.name: Stolid flycatcher
nodes.summary: Stolid flycatcher（Stolid flycatcher，学名 Myiarchus stolidus），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，常见栖息地包括灌丛，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏、农药污染。

nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: 灌丛
nodes.summary: 低矮木本植物占优势的陆地生境。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: | page =406 }} It inhabits the interior and edges of lowland forest, drier woodlands, scrublands, and mangroves

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: No immediate threats have been identified. It is considered common on both islands. "Habitat loss [is] continuing throughout this species' range; problems include hurricane damage, widespread pesticide use, plantations of exotic trees, timber removal, deliberate fires, and continuing conversion for small-scale farming and urbanization."

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: No immediate threats have been identified. It is considered common on both islands. "Habitat loss [is] continuing throughout this species' range; problems include hurricane damage, widespread pesticide use, plantations of exotic trees, timber removal, deliberate fires, and continuing conversion for small-scale farming and urbanization."
